rules: Reuse exact bank+header mapping before AI.
Reuse same-bank mapping by column names when possible.
Detect date, description, debit, credit, amount, balance, and direction columns.
Use debit/credit columns when separate; use amount+direction when present.
DR means Payment, CR means Receipt.
Negative debit/payment reverses to Receipt; negative credit/receipt reverses to Payment.
Amount output is always positive with two decimals.
Closing balance ignores page-number and serial-looking cells.
Wrapped raw CSV lines are merged before normalization.
Missing transactions are recovered deterministically without AI.
